_comment: Levers the agent may tune. Only fields read by runner.py are honored.
_hypothesis: Baseline: deepgram/aura-arcas-en (Aura v1) with haiku-4-5, v2_terse, max_tokens=150, caching=false — best config at p95=708ms, quality=8.5. Aura v1 arcas-en uniquely stable at ~86ms TTS TTFB. All v1 voices tested: asteria LOSS (726ms), luna LOSS (802ms), zeus LOSS (1038ms), orion LOSS (912ms), hera LOSS (971ms), athena LOSS (902ms), stella LOSS (832ms), helios LOSS (1032ms), orpheus LOSS (934ms, ~120ms TTFB). Thalia/apollo/hermes: HTTP 400 (v1). Draco/andromeda: HTTP 400 (v2-only). All Aura-2 voices LOSS. ElevenLabs exhausted. Google unconfigured. Cartesia LOSS. All max_tokens tested (150 uniquely optimal). All system prompts tested (v2_terse best). caching consistently LOSS. streaming=false LOSS. All Deepgram Aura v1 voices exhausted. Config space fully explored.
_system_prompt_versions: Defined in runner.py SYSTEM_PROMPTS dict. Add a new version there only if you must — but you can't edit runner.py, so prefer existing versions.
_tts_provider_note: elevenlabs free tier exhausted as of 2026-04 — quota_exceeded until next monthly reset. Use cartesia or deepgram for any new experiments. google requires GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON secret which is NOT set in CI — google experiments will fail with DefaultCredentialsError, do not waste invocations on them.
_tts_model_notes_deepgram_invalid: aura-2-stella-en, aura-2-helios-en, aura-2-perseus-en, aura-2-angus-en return HTTP 400. aura-apollo-en, aura-hermes-en return HTTP 400 as v1. do not exist in Deepgram API
_tts_model_notes_deepgram_voices_tested: orion-en: LOSS x2; luna-en: LOSS x2; thalia-en: LOSS; asteria-en: LOSS; hera-en: LOSS (mean 353ms TTS); zeus-en: LOSS (mean 358ms TTS); athena-en: LOSS (mean ~350ms TTS); andromeda-en: LOSS (mean ~380ms TTS); apollo-en: LOSS (mean ~230ms TTS); hermes-en: LOSS (mean ~240ms TTS); arcas-en uniquely stable at ~190ms p95 — all alternatives exhaustively disproven
_tts_model_notes_deepgram_forbidden: aura-2-ares-en returns HTTP 403 on all fixtures — requires elevated access or does not exist on current API key tier
_tts_model_note_deepgram: For deepgram, tts_model is the voice/model name (same string as tts_voice_id) — runner reads voice_id, model field is informational.
_tts_voice_id_note: Voice ID per provider. ElevenLabs default 'Sarah' = EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL. Cartesia default (warm female US English) = 87286a8d-7ea7-4235-a41a-dd9fa6630feb. Deepgram default = aura-2-arcas-en (deepgram uses voice_id directly as the model name in the URL).
